bird.name: Black-throated green warbler
bird.summary: The black-throated green warbler (Setophaga virens) is a small songbird of the New World warbler family. Description It has an olive-green…

relations.subject: Black-throated green warbler
relations.evidence: The breeding habitat of the black-throated green warbler is coniferous and mixed forests in eastern North America and western Canada and cypress swamps on the southern Atlantic coast, with preference for dense stands of conifers.{{Cite journal |last1=Robichaud |first1=Isabelle |last2=Villard |first2=Marc-Andre |date=1999 |title=Do black-throated green warblers prefer conifers?
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
